# 2. Technical Architecture

# 4. Smart Contract API Reference
# 5. Testnet Deployments
# 6. Security Model
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

## 1. PROJECT OVERVIEW

OPWA (Onchain Proof of World Asset) is the first real estate tokenization protocol
built natively on Bitcoin Layer 1 via OP_NET smart contracts.

Key properties:
- Native Bitcoin — no bridges, sidechains, or wrapped assets
- Fractional ownership via OP-20 fungible tokens (FractionalToken per property)
- Property title NFTs via OP-721 (PropertyNFT — one per real-world property)
- Platform utility token: OPWA (OPWACoin) — OP-20, 21M max supply, 8 decimals
- Yield distribution to fractional token holders via YieldDistributor contract
- OPWA/BTC liquidity on Motoswap (AMM DEX native to OP_NET)

Tech stack:
- Frontend: React 19, TypeScript, Vite, TailwindCSS, Zustand, React Router
- SDK: opnet, @btc-vision/transaction, @btc-vision/bitcoin (NO ethers.js)
- Wallet: OP_WALLET (primary), UniSat, XVerse via @btc-vision/walletconnect
- RPC: https://testnet.opnet.org (testnet) | Chain ID: 1338

## 2. HOW IT WORKS

Step 1 — TOKENIZE
  A real-world property is verified. Legal documents are uploaded to IPFS/Arweave.
  The owner mints a PropertyNFT (OP-721) representing sole title on Bitcoin L1.

Step 2 — FRACTIONALIZE
  The NFT is locked in the PropertyNFT contract.
  A FractionalToken (OP-20) is deployed with a fixed supply = total_fractions.
  Investors purchase fractional shares with native BTC.

Step 3 — EARN
  Property rental income is deposited on-chain to the YieldDistributor contract.
  Yield is distributed pro-rata to FractionalToken holders, paid in OPWA tokens.

Step 4 — TRADE
  Fractional shares and OPWA tokens trade on Motoswap (https://motoswap.org)
  with native BTC liquidity pairs. No CEX, no custodian.

Step 5 — REDEEM
  When 100% of fractional shares are redeemed by a single holder,
  the PropertyNFT is unlocked and full property title returns to that holder.

## 3. SMART CONTRACT API (SUMMARY)

### OPWACoin (OP-20)
  name() → "OPWACoin"
  symbol() → "OPWA"
  decimals() → 8
  totalSupply() → u256
  balanceOf(account: Address) → u256
  transfer(to, value) | approve(spender, value) | transferFrom(from, to, value)
  mint(to, value) — OWNER ONLY
  burn(value)

### PropertyNFT (OP-721)
  name() → "OPWA Property"
  symbol() → "OPWA-PROP"
  tokenURI(tokenId) → IPFS metadata URI
  ownerOf(tokenId) → Address
  balanceOf(owner) → u256
  mint(metadataURI) — OWNER ONLY
  fractionalize(tokenId, fractionalContractAddress)
  unlockOnRedemption(tokenId) — FRACTIONAL CONTRACT ONLY
  transferFrom(from, to, tokenId) — BLOCKED while fractionalized

### YieldDistributor (in development)
  depositYield(propertyId, amount)
  claim(propertyId)
  pendingYield(propertyId, holder)

## 4. FRONTEND ARCHITECTURE

src/
  lib/opnet.ts        — provider, getBlockHeight(), getBalance(), getTokenInfo()
  lib/motoswap.ts     — Motoswap trade/pool URL helpers
  lib/utils.ts        — formatSatsToBTC, formatNumber, mock data generators
  hooks/useWallet.ts  — OP_WALLET connection via @btc-vision/walletconnect
  hooks/useOPNETWallet.ts — Raw SDK hook (walletAddress, signer, provider, etc.)
  hooks/useSyncWallet.ts  — Syncs SDK state → Zustand every 60s
  hooks/useBlockHeight.ts — Polls OP_NET block height every 30s
  utils/opnetContracts.ts — getOP20Contract(), fetchTokenMetadata(), fetchTokenBalance()
  utils/defaultProvider.ts — Public RPC provider for read-only calls
  store/useAppStore.ts    — Zustand global state (wallet, properties, portfolio)
  pages/Dashboard.tsx     — Live stats (block height, balance) + property listings
  pages/Marketplace.tsx   — Buy/sell property fractional tokens
  pages/AdminMint.tsx     — Admin: mint PropertyNFT (owner wallet only)

## 5. ENVIRONMENT VARIABLES

VITE_OP_NET_TESTNET_RPC=https://testnet.opnet.org
VITE_OP_NET_TESTNET_CHAIN_ID=1338
VITE_OPWA_TOKEN_ADDRESS=<deployed OPWACoin contract address>
VITE_PROPERTY_NFT_ADDRESS=<deployed PropertyNFT contract address>

## 6. TESTNET DEPLOYMENT STATUS (February 2026)

OPWACoin: pending deployment
PropertyNFT: pending deployment
YieldDistributor: in development

OP_NET Mainnet launch: March 17, 2026
OPWA mainnet migration: Q2 2026
